creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
We can add:
> DOCS_BUILD_DEPENDS=     docbook2html:textproc/docbook-utils \
>                         docbook2pdf:textproc/docbook-utils
> DOCS_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=  doc
but
1) "docbook2pdf -o pdf/ siproxd_guide.sgml" doesn't work for me,
2) textproc/docbook-utils is "DEPRECATED=Depends on expired textproc/jade".


Committed without this improvement.
Thanks!
